display_name: Generic Vayrax Drone Iron Awareness Test
description: Generic event-engine awareness test for the Teir Climb universe. An NPC gives a quest, the event waits for existing Vayrax drone defeat intel, then checks iron item discovery intel before returning to the NPC for a credits reward.

dialogue_lines: I need a clean event-engine test.
Drop two known Vayrax drones, then let the story system notice the intel.
giver.offer_text: Defeat Vayrax Drone 002 and Vayrax Drone 003. The event will wait for a poke, confirm the drone defeat intel, then confirm that iron has already been discovered.
giver.success_text: Good. The test event is now watching the intel handlers.
giver.event_accept_message: Good. Defeat the two Vayrax drones and let the event console catch up.
giver.event_decline_message: No problem. The test can wait.
giver.event_idle_message: The event is waiting on two Vayrax drone defeat records.

reward_packet.message: Awareness test complete. Credits x200 received.

talk_to_test_contact.objective_text: Talk to the Intel Test Contact near Tier 1 Star.
npc_dialogue_lines: This is a generic event-engine awareness test.
Defeat Vayrax Drone 002 and Vayrax Drone 003. The event will wait until the defeat intel exists.

wait_for_two_vayrax_drones.objective_text: Defeat Vayrax Drone 002 and Vayrax Drone 003. The event will react after the next event poke.

on_enter.title: TEST GOOD: VAYRAX DRONE COUNT
on_enter.text:
[b]TEST GOOD[/b]

The event engine saw defeated enemy intel for two existing Vayrax drones:

- Vayrax Drone 002
- Vayrax Drone 003

Close this popup to check iron discovery next.

check_iron_awareness.objective_text: Event engine is checking that iron has already been discovered.

on_enter.title: TEST GOOD: IRON DISCOVERY
on_enter.text:
[b]TEST GOOD[/b]

The event engine checked item discovery intel and found iron.

Return to the Intel Test Contact for the reward.

return_to_test_contact.objective_text: Return to the Intel Test Contact and claim the awareness test reward.
npc_dialogue_lines: The event engine saw both checks.
Claim the test reward and we can call this pass clean.
completed_npc_dialogue_lines: Enemy defeat intel and item discovery intel both resolved.

test_notes: Placed in universe_2 because the lane display name is Teir Climb.
This file does not create event enemies. It watches enemy-intel defeat counts for existing enemy display names.
The current enemy-intel count check is display-name based, so this test waits for Vayrax Drone 002 and Vayrax Drone 003 specifically.
The reward stores credits: 200 and also grants credits as an inventory item because current reward grant code processes reward_packet.items.
